title: pisum pratense
intro: Pisum pratense, commonly known as the wild sweet pea or garden pea, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pisum pratense include reducing symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats, as well as alleviating symptoms of depression and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Pisum pratense are often made into teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
